label: Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation

node.label: Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation
node.definition: Memory lifecycle policies decide what to record, summarize, validate, retain, merge, expire, forget, or delete across repeated interactions.
node.why_it_matters: Persistent memory needs explicit freshness, privacy, conflict, and capacity rules rather than unbounded accumulation.
limitations: Deleting derived influence is difficult, stale memories can persist, and consolidation may erase minority or recent evidence.

dependencies.rationale: Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation stores, selects, or obtains information through Episodic memory.
Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation stores, selects, or obtains information through Semantic memory.
In this atlas graph, Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation has a `retrieves_from` dependency on Knowledge editing & memory consolidation with `common` strength.
In this atlas graph, Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation has a `retrieves_from` dependency on Provenance, citations & evidence tracking with `common` strength.

sentence_units.text: Memory lifecycle policies decide what to record, summarize, validate, retain, merge, expire, forget, or delete across repeated interactions.
Persistent memory needs explicit freshness, privacy, conflict, and capacity rules rather than unbounded accumulation.
Deleting derived influence is difficult, stale memories can persist, and consolidation may erase minority or recent evidence.
Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation stores, selects, or obtains information through Episodic memory.
